ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the university */,
  "conference_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation with the athletic conference */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the university was established */,
  "athletic_department_name" TEXT /* Name of the athletic department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaching_staff" (
  "coaching_staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coaching staff member */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the coaching staff member belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coaching staff member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the coaching staff member (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "years_of_service" INTEGER /* Number of years the coaching staff member has been serving */,
  "highest_education" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "coaching_certificate" TEXT /* Coaching certification(s) held */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coaching_staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaching_staff_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compensation_data" (
  "compensation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compensation record */,
  "coaching_staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coaching staff member the compensation record belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the compensation data is for */,
  "total_pay" REAL /* Total pay for the coaching staff member */,
  "school_pay" REAL /* Pay from the school */,
  "other_pay" REAL /* Pay from other sources */,
  "maximum_bonus" REAL /* Maximum bonus available */,
  "bonuses_paid" REAL /* Bonuses paid to the coaching staff member */,
  "school_buyout" REAL /* School buyout amount */,
  "deferred_compensation" REAL /* Deferred compensation amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compensation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compensation_data_coaching_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("coaching_staff_id") REFERENCES coaching_staff ("coaching_staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "position_level" INTEGER /* Level of the position (e.g., 1 - Head Coach, 2 - Assistant Coach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "coaching_staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coaching staff member the performance record belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the performance data is for */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the coaching staff member */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the coaching staff member */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage for the coaching staff member */,
  "conference_win_percentage" REAL /* Conference win percentage for the coaching staff member */,
  "postseason_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of postseason appearances */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bonuses" (
  "bonus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bonus record */,
  "compensation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compensation record the bonus belongs to */,
  "bonus_type" TEXT /* Type of bonus (e.g., performance-based, signing bonus) */,
  "bonus_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bonus */,
  "bonus_description" TEXT /* Description of the bonus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bonus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonuses_compensation_id FOREIGN KEY ("compensation_id") REFERENCES compensation_data ("compensation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyouts" (
  "buyout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyout record */,
  "compensation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compensation record the buyout belongs to */,
  "buyout_amount" REAL /* Amount of the buyout */,
  "buyout_date" TEXT /* Date the buyout was paid */,
  "buyout_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the buyout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buyouts_compensation_id FOREIGN KEY ("compensation_id") REFERENCES compensation_data ("compensation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., athletic director, administrator, conference official) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conference_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Full name of the conference official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the conference official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the conference official */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the conference official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "university_administrators" (
  "administrator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university administrator */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the administrator belongs to */,
  "administrator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the university administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the university administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the university administrator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the administrator belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administrator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_university_administrators_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaching_staff_hierarchy" (
  "hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hierarchy record */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the hierarchy belongs to */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  "reports_to_position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position that the current position reports to */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Level of the position in the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaching_staff_hierarchy_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaching_staff_hierarchy_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaching_staff_affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation record */,
  "coaching_staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coaching staff member */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the coaching staff member is affiliated with */,
  "conference_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation with the conference */,
  "affiliation_type" TEXT /* Type of affiliation (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaching_staff_affiliations_coaching_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("coaching_staff_id") REFERENCES coaching_staff ("coaching_staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaching_staff_affiliations_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., win-loss record, attendance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
